For weeks, Daniel noticed small bumps appearing. At first, he ignored them. Then came the itching… the burning… and the constant embarrassment every time he looked in the mirror.

He avoided intimacy, felt distracted at work, and lived with the fear of it spreading further. Nothing he tried worked — creams, powders, even prescriptions.

That’s when he discovered Fivfivgo® Intimate Soothe Shower Gel.

✔️ Targets HPV-related skin issues with natural, soothing actives
✔️ Calms irritation instantly — no burning, no harsh chemicals
✔️ Deep-cleanses and protects sensitive skin with daily freshness
✔️ Supports skin healing while preventing recurrence

Now Daniel finally feels in control again. The discomfort is gone, the bumps are fading, and his confidence is back.

👉 Don’t let irritation and warts control your life. Take the first step toward relief today with Fivfivgo® Intimate Soothe.

This is not podiatry. This is not an ordinary nail salon. This is Hand&Foot Aesthetic Clinic, where we specialize in the advanced care of hands and feet, focusing on restoring their health while enhancing their appearance. 

Our team of trained professionals bridges the gap between medical knowledge and aesthetic treatment, offering a unique, results-driven and comprehensive approach to manicure and pedicure services.

Our services include:
✔ Medical Pedicure
✔ Nail Restoration
✔ Japanese Manicure
✔ Bio Sculpture
✔ Diabetic Care
✔ Nail Psoriasis
✔ Non-invasive Ingrown Nail Removal
✔ Damaged and Infected Nail Treatment
✔ Gentle Wart Treatment
✔ Medical Grade Salon Manicure & Pedicure
✔ Ingrown Nail Bracing
✔ Hyperlight Therapy
✔ Therapy for Nail Biters️

If you're not happy with the condition of your nails, hands or feet visit us at Hand&Foot Aesthetic Clinic, 37 Mayne Rd, Bowen Hills 4006. Book a treatment, schedule a consultation, or simply get in touch to find out how we can support your hand and foot health.

Hammond Park Family Practice
Sponsored
Hammond Park Family Practice are please to announce the arrival of a New GP 
Dr David Pettitt who will joining our Family from 
09/02/2026
Dr David Pettitt is a UK-trained General Practitioner based in Perth with a specialist interest in skin cancer medicine, dermatology, and minor surgery. Uniquely, David began his career training in Plastic and Reconstructive Surgery in London and Oxford.
This background has provided him with advanced skills in surgical technique, wound management, and the aesthetic outcomes of skin procedures.
He later completed General Practice via a prestigious NIHR Academic Clinical Fellowship, combining surgical expertise with comprehensive, evidence-based primary care.
David holds an award-winning PhD (DPhil) from the University of Oxford, has published extensively in medical literature, and has presented his research globally. He has also taught at leading institutions, including Imperial College London and the University of Oxford. In practice, David places a strong emphasis on early diagnosis and high-quality procedural care.
He is known for his thorough consultations and focus on preventative health strategies -
Supporting patients in protecting their long-term health and wellbeing.
Hammond Park Family Practice
High quality 7 days a week, mixed billing practice in a new big facility!
Call now

Yangebup's 28 Day Female Only Beginner Program
If the thought of walking into a mixed gym makes you hesitate, this will feel different.

New Vision Women’s Fitness is a female-only facility built to inspire and empower women to feel stronger, healthier, and more confident in their everyday lives.
This 28 day beginner program is designed for women who want support, structure, and guidance from coaches who genuinely care.

You won’t be left guessing what to do.
You won’t feel judged.
You won’t be competing for space or attention.

You’ll train in a welcoming, all-female environment where strength is built gradually and confidence grows naturally.
Coaches like Louis, Sarah and Louise guide you through proper technique, nutrition support, and realistic habits that fit into real life.

As one member shared:
“I’m not a gym person at all. Just having the extra support and showing me how to correctly do the exercises has given me more confidence and a new love of the gym environment. I also have more energy for my kids, work and life.”

This is about more than workouts.
It’s about feeling capable again.
FB.ME
A Female-Only Gym Designed For Real Support In Yangebup

Glo Dental Clinic
Sponsored
If you’ve ever tried booking with Glo Dental Clinic, you might have noticed something.

There are two clinics listed.

And naturally a small question pops into your mind: “Which one am I supposed to pick?” 🤔

Many patients mention having the exact same thought, especially when they’re visiting for the first time.

It’s a completely normal moment of confusion when you realise there are two locations to choose from.

The two clinics are actually only about five minutes apart, and both are run by the same team with the same approach to patient care.

So whichever location you choose, you’ll still be seeing the same familiar team.

🦷 Cockburn Central — Plaza 817 on Beeliar Drive  
🦷 Beeliar — Beeliar Drive in Yangebup  
🦷 The same team and philosophy across both locations  
🦷 Convenient parking and the same payment options

Because the clinics are so close together, many people simply choose the location that fits best with their day.

For some, it’s the one closer to home. For others, it might be the appointment time that works better with their schedule.

If you’d like to organise a visit, you’re welcome to book at whichever Glo Dental Clinic is most convenient for you. 🤍
0:00 / 1:33
